# Project Standards

## Files matching `backend/**/*.{cs,csproj}`

<!-- Source: local .apm/instructions/backend.instructions.md -->

## Backend Standards

- .NET 10 Web API with clean architecture (Api, Core, Infrastructure layers)
- Entity Framework Core with Postgres
- .NET Aspire for local dev orchestration
- xUnit for testing
- Backend is optional — activated by presence of `backend/` directory
